translations.de: Ganz ehrlich, hier ist es mies.
translations.pt: Sinceramente, isto aqui está um caos.
translations.vi: Thật lòng mà nói, ở đây tệ lắm.
translations.nl: Eerlijk gezegd, het is hier een puinhoop.
translations.hi: सच कहूँ तो यहाँ हालत बहुत खराब है.
translations.nb: Ærlig talt, her er det et skikkelig rot.
translations.sv: Ärligt talat, här är det riktigt illa.
translations.da: Ærligt talt, her er det slemt.

tokens.explanation: Sentence adverb expressing the speaker’s attitude; sets an evaluative tone.
Clitic subject pronoun ‘ce’ elided before a vowel; subject of the copular construction.
3rd person singular present of ‘être’; copula linking the subject ‘c’’ to the predicate nominal.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun ‘misère’.
Common noun functioning as predicate nominal after the copula.
Locative adverb indicating place.

sentences.target: Ils vivent dans la misère depuis longtemps.
sentences.reading: /il viv dɑ̃ la mizɛʁ dəpɥi lɔ̃tɑ̃/

translations.fr: Ils vivent dans la misère depuis longtemps.
translations.ipa: /il viv dɑ̃ la mizɛʁ dəpɥi lɔ̃tɑ̃/
translations.en: They have been living in poverty for a long time.
translations.es: Llevan mucho tiempo viviendo en la pobreza.
translations.de: Sie leben schon lange in Armut.
translations.it: Vivono nella povertà da molto tempo.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们长期生活在贫困中。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺貧窮當中生活咗好耐。
translations.pt: Eles vivem na pobreza há muito tempo.
translations.he: הם חיים בעוני כבר זמן רב.
translations.vi: Họ sống trong cảnh nghèo đói đã lâu.
translations.ar: إنهم يعيشون في فقر منذ وقت طويل.
translations.nl: Ze leven al lang in armoede.
translations.hi: वे लंबे समय से गरीबी में रह रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Oni od dawna żyją w biedzie.
translations.el: Ζουν στη φτώχεια εδώ και πολύ καιρό.
translations.nb: De har levd i fattigdom i lang tid.
translations.id: Mereka sudah lama hidup dalam kemiskinan.
translations.sv: De har levt i fattigdom länge.
translations.ro: Trăiesc în sărăcie de mult timp.
translations.da: De har levet i fattigdom i lang tid.
translations.fi: He ovat eläneet köyhyydessä jo pitkään.
translations.ja: 彼らは長い間貧困の中で暮らしている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed).
Main verb, present tense, 3rd person plural; denotes ongoing living condition.
Preposition introducing a locative/figurative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing ‘misère’.
Common noun serving as the object of the preposition ‘dans’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement indicating duration or starting point.
Temporal adverb expressing extended duration.

sentences.target: On sort de cette misère ensemble, d'accord.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sɔʁ də sɛt mizɛʁ ɑ̃sɑ̃bl dakɔʁ/

translations.fr: On sort de cette misère ensemble, d'accord.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sɔʁ də sɛt mizɛʁ ɑ̃sɑ̃bl dakɔʁ/
translations.en: We're getting out of this hardship together, okay.
translations.de: Wir kommen da gemeinsam raus, okay.
translations.ko: 우리 함께 이 어려움에서 벗어나자, 알겠지.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们会一起摆脱这困境。
translations.yue: 我哋會一齊走出呢個困境。
translations.ru: Мы вместе выберемся из этой беды, ладно.
translations.pt: Vamos sair desta dificuldade juntos, certo.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ cùng nhau vượt qua khó khăn này.
translations.nl: We komen hier samen uit, oké.
translations.uk: Ми разом виберемося з цієї скрути, гаразд.
translations.hu: Együtt kimászunk ebből a bajból, rendben.
translations.hi: हम इस मुश्किल से साथ मिलकर बाहर निकलेंगे, ठीक है.
translations.pl: Razem wyjdziemy z tej trudnej sytuacji, dobrze.
translations.el: Θα βγούμε από αυτή τη δυσκολία μαζί, εντάξει.
translations.nb: Vi skal komme oss ut av dette sammen, greit.
translations.id: Kita akan keluar dari kesulitan ini bersama, oke.
translations.sv: Vi tar oss ur det här tillsammans, okej.
translations.ro: Vom ieși din asta împreună, bine.
translations.cs: Společně se z toho dostaneme, dobře.
translations.da: Vi kommer ud af det her sammen, godt.
translations.ja: 一緒にこの困難を乗り越えよう、いいね。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun often meaning ‘we’ in conversational French.
Main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular agreeing with ‘on’; denotes exiting/leaving.
Preposition introducing a source/origin complement (‘de cette misère’).
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying ‘misère’.
Common noun, head of the noun phrase governed by ‘de’.
Manner adverb indicating joint action.
Elided preposition ‘de’ before a vowel; part of the fixed expression ‘d’accord’.
Noun; with ‘d’’ forms the set phrase ‘d’accord’ functioning as a discourse marker (‘agreed/OK’).

translations.es: Vaya día de perros, de verdad.
translations.de: Was für ein Mist heute, wirklich.
translations.vi: Hôm nay thật là tệ, thật đấy.
translations.ar: يا له من يوم سيئ اليوم، فعلاً.
translations.hi: आज तो सच में बहुत बुरा दिन है.
translations.pl: Co za okropny dzień dziś, naprawdę.
translations.nb: For en kjip dag i dag, virkelig.
translations.cs: Dneska je to fakt bída, vážně.
translations.da: Sikke en lortedag i dag, virkelig.
translations.fi: Mikä kurja päivä tänään, ihan oikeasti.

tokens.explanation: Exclamative/interrogative determiner, feminine singular, modifying ‘misère’; conveys ‘what a’.
Common noun, head of an exclamative noun phrase.
Temporal adverb specifying the time frame.
Comment/intensifier adverb reinforcing the evaluation.
